response:
"---
name: chrome
description: 'Read this when you need to use Chrome extension APIs: managing bookmarks, tabs, windows, tab groups, history, downloads, or top sites.'
icon: https://static.asidehq.com/apps/builtin-skills/chrome.svg
---
# Chrome MV3 APIs

Use the `chrome` global in the REPL. It exposes whitelisted Chrome MV3 methods with the same method names and positional arguments as extension code.

```js
const tabs = await chrome.tabs.query({});
const bookmark = await chrome.bookmarks.create({ title: 'Aside', url: 'https://aside.com' });
```

Only methods listed in this skill are callable. Use Asidewright (`page`, `locator`, `snapshot`, `openTab`) for page interaction; use `chrome.*` for browser-profile state such as bookmarks, tabs, windows, history, downloads, and top sites.

## References

- Bookmarks: read `./bookmarks.md`
- Tabs: read `./tabs.md`
- Windows: read `./windows.md`
- Tab groups: read `./tab-groups.md`
- History: read `./history.md`
- Downloads: read `./downloads.md`
- Top sites: read `./top-sites.md`"

action_line: read_file("\"path\":\"/Users/awm/.aside/u/0/agents/main/skills/chrome/tabs.md\",\"limit\":200")
response:
"# Tabs API

Use `chrome.tabs.*` for tab strip state. Prefer `openTab`, `closeTab`, and `page` for normal browsing; use this API when the task is about Chrome tabs themselves.

## Methods

### `chrome.tabs.query(queryInfo)`

- `queryInfo: { active?: boolean; currentWindow?: boolean; windowId?: number; url?: string | string[]; title?: string; pinned?: boolean; audible?: boolean; discarded?: boolean; groupId?: number; index?: number }`

### `chrome.tabs.get(tabId)`

- `tabId: number`

### `chrome.tabs.create(createProperties)`

- `createProperties: { url?: string; active?: boolean; pinned?: boolean; windowId?: number; index?: number; openerTabId?: number }`

### `chrome.tabs.update(tabId?, updateProperties)`

- `tabId?: number`
- `updateProperties: { url?: string; active?: boolean; highlighted?: boolean; pinned?: boolean; muted?: boolean; openerTabId?: number; autoDiscardable?: boolean }`

### `chrome.tabs.remove(tabIds)`

- `tabIds: number | number[]`

### `chrome.tabs.reload(tabId?, reloadProperties?)`

- `tabId?: number`
- `reloadProperties?: { bypassCache?: boolean }`

### `chrome.tabs.move(tabIds, moveProperties)`

- `tabIds: number | number[]`
- `moveProperties: { windowId?: number; index: number }`

### `chrome.tabs.duplicate(tabId)`

- `tabId: number`

### `chrome.tabs.group(options)`

- `options: { tabIds: number | number[]; groupId?: number; createProperties?: { windowId?: number } }`

### `chrome.tabs.ungroup(tabIds)`

- `tabIds: number | number[]`

### `chrome.tabs.goBack(tabId?)`

- `tabId?: number`

### `chrome.tabs.goForward(tabId?)`

- `tabId?: number`"

"<webfetch-citation source_id="DvfOIlkMv7WBBPsrDI5oP" />

Trusted by 10,000+ customers across the UK

## Send Letters Online in the UK

Upload your PDF and we'll print, pack and post your letter anywhere in the UK — faster, simpler and cheaper than doing it yourself.

From £2.99 total Next day UK delivery No account needed Order by 2:30 PM for same-day dispatch

## How to Send a Letter Online in 3 Steps

No trips to the Post Office, no printer ink, no envelopes. Just upload and we handle the rest.

1

### Upload Your PDF

Upload your letter as a PDF file. We accept any standard A4 document — solicitor letters, official correspondence, personal mail, invoices and more.

2

### We Print & Pack It

Our team prints your letter on high-quality paper, folds it neatly and seals it in a professional envelope — ready for the post.

3

### We Post It for You

Your letter is collected and dispatched the same working day (order before 2:30 PM). It arrives at the UK ...[truncated 3022 chars]...UK letters start from £2.99 for standard delivery. This includes printing, folding, enveloping and postage — everything handled for you. No hidden fees.

### How quickly will my letter arrive?

Orders placed before 2:30 PM on a working day are dispatched the same day. UK next-day delivery is typically 1–2 business days. You can also choose a tracked option for added peace of mind.

### Can I send letters in bulk?

Yes. We support high-volume sending for businesses. Whether you send 10 or 10,000 letters per month, our business portal is built to handle it. Get in touch for a custom quote.

### Is PrintPigeon cheaper than going to the Post Office?

Yes — once you factor in the cost of printing, ink, envelopes and a stamp, our service typically saves you 30–60% compared to doing it yourself. And it saves your time too.

## Ready to Send Your Letter Online?

Join thousands of people across the UK who use PrintPigeon every day. Upload, pay, done — your letter is on its way."

"I got the shortlist and pages, but I couldn’t leave browser tabs open: the browser tab opener failed with connection errors, and the Chrome tab API wasn’t connected. Here are the direct pages to open:

- MSE SIM-only finder: https://www.moneysavingexpert.com/cheap-mobile-finder/sim-only/
- Vodafone Xtra page: https://www.vodafone.co.uk/broadband/broadband-and-tv
- PrintPigeon order page: https://printpigeon.co.uk/order

### MSE cheap SIM-only baseline

I treated MSE’s “equivalent monthly cost” as the sortable low-end comparison, because the cheapest deals often use temporary discounts or vouchers.

| Rank | Provider | Monthly price | Contract | Data |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | Lebara | £2.48/mth equivalent, £2.45/mth months 1-9 then £5.90, with £10 gift card | 1 month rolling | 10GB |
| 2 | Lebara | £2.93/mth equivalent, £2.38/mth months 1-9 then £7.90, with £10 gift card | 1 month rolling | 15GB |
| 3 | iD Mobile | £3/mth equivalent, £4.50/mth months 1-3 then £9, with £58.50 gift card | 12 months | 36GB |

MSE shows these deals with unlimited minutes and texts, and sorted by equivalent monthly cost. <citation refs="TPIcmqHYgbl2bnHMPC1dU"><quote>5G data 10GB... Mins/texts Unlimited... Contract 1 mth... Months 1-9 £2.45 /mth... Thereafter £5.90 /mth... Gift card £10... Equiv cost... £2.48/mth</quote><quote>5G data 15GB... Mins/texts Unlimited... Contract 1 mth... Months 1-9 £2.38 /mth... Thereafter £7.90 /mth... Gift card £10... Equiv cost... £2.93/mth</quote></citation> <citation refs="nCdfEDL8-PJ_YJMlGJmnC"><quote>5G data 36GB... Mins/texts Unlimited... Contract 12 mth... Months 1-3 £4.50 /mth... Months 4-12 £9 /mth... Gift card £58.50... Equiv cost... £3/mth</quote></citation>

### Vodafone “Xtra 40”

“Xtra” is not the broadband speed tier. Vodafone says Xtra is an add-on/bundle that includes Apple TV 4K, 3 months of Apple TV, and Anytime UK landline and mobile calls. <citation refs="YvVmjUge2h3Kz_KH-PzJn"><quote>Get Apple TV 4K in...[truncated 985 chars]..."
